channel.title: ClaimWatch
channel.description: ClaimWatch is a searchable US consumer alert database for recalls, refunds, settlements, and claim deadlines, built from official sources and current search trend signals.

item.title: FSIS Issues Public Health Alert for Various Meat and Poultry Products Containing FDA-Regulated Dairy Products That Have Been Recalled Due to Possible Salmonella Contamination
item.description: Active Thu, 04/30/2026 - Current Nationwide Last Updated: This release was last updated on May 1, 2026, to reflect additional affected products and their corresponding labels. WASHINGTON, APRIL 30, 2026 – The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s Food Safety and Inspection Service (FSIS) is issuing a public health alert for meat and... Impacted Products PHA-04092026-01 Public Health Alert Misbranding Unreported Allergens

item.title: Ethnic Foods Inc: Bombay Kitchen brand Tikka Sev; Net Wt 9oz (255g); Recall
item.description: Product(s) contain undeclared colors, FD&C Yellow #6 and FD&C Red #40 Product details: Bombay Kitchen brand Tikka Sev; Net Wt 9oz (255g); INGREDIENTS: Chickpea Flour, Water, Non-GMO Expeller Pressed Canola Oil, Spices, Salt, FD&C Tomato Color and Citric Acid; CAUTION: May Contain Traces of Peanuts, Cashews and/or Tree Nuts; Manufactured by Bomba...

item.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation: Kirkland Signature Traditional Madeleines 12 Count/net wt. 18oz., Item #2000012, Recall
item.description: Undeclared hazelnut and soy lecithin. Product details: Kirkland Signature Traditional Madeleines 12 Count/net wt. 18oz., Item #2000012, UPC 000020000127. Plastic clamshell container is packed with 9 pieces of Filled Heart Madeleines. Distributed by Costco Wholesale Corp. Seattle, WA. Label of recalled package is r...

item.title: Summit Import Corporation: Spice Powder, 4 oz, Plastic Bag Recall
item.description: Lead level was higher than NYSAGM Standard. Product details: Spice Powder, 4 oz, Plastic Bag

item.title: Ethnic Foods Inc: Bombay Kitchen brand Punjabi Mix; Net Wt 9oz (255g); Recall
item.description: Product(s) contain undeclared colors, FD&C Yellow #6 and FD&C Red #40 Product details: Bombay Kitchen brand Punjabi Mix; Net Wt 9oz (255g); INGREDIENTS: Chickpea Flour, Water, Non-GMO Expeller Pressed Canola Oil, Chana Dal (Split Bengal Gram), Brown Lentils (Masoor), Chickpeas, Rice Flakes, Puffed Rice, Spices, Sugar, Peanuts, Raisins, Yogurt (p...

item.title: Marquez Brothers International, Inc.: Bulk Horchata Powder 3951 (100547) 1/25 HORCHATA Recall
item.description: Undeclared milk. Product details: Bulk Horchata Powder 3951 (100547) 1/25 HORCHATA UPC: 042743-19015-0 Item: 100547

item.title: Unistel Industries Inc.: SALUTE SEASONINGS; Ground All Spice; Net Wt 16oz; Unistel Industries 650 Blossom Road Rochester, NY 14610; Recall
item.description: Product may be contaminated with Salmonella. Product details: SALUTE SEASONINGS; Ground All Spice; Net Wt 16oz; Unistel Industries 650 Blossom Road Rochester, NY 14610; UPC: 7 69203 01617 0

item.title: Marquez Brothers International, Inc.: EL MEXICANO agua fresca de horchata Instant Horchata Drink NET WT 12oz (340g) Recall
item.description: Undeclared milk. Product details: EL MEXICANO agua fresca de horchata Instant Horchata Drink NET WT 12oz (340g) INGREDIENTS: *** MILK SUBSTITUTE (WHEY *** LACTOSE *** DISTRIBUTED BY MARQUEZ BROTHERS INTERNATIONAL, INC. San Jose CA 95138 UPC: 042743190204 Item: 102279

item.title: Marquez Brothers International, Inc.: EL MEXICANO horchata casera Instant Horchata Drink NET WT 14oz (396g) Recall
item.description: Undeclared milk. Product details: EL MEXICANO horchata casera Instant Horchata Drink NET WT 14oz (396g) INGREDIENTS: *** MILK SUBSTITUTE (WHEY *** LACTOSE *** DISTRIBUTED BY MARQUEZ BROTHERS INTERNATIONAL, INC. San Jose CA 95138 UPC: 042743190266 Item: 102284

item.title: Mondelez Global Llc: CHIPS AHOY! Baked Bites Brookie .22.4 oz Carton ( 2.8 oz pouch ) and 7.7 oz Carton ( 1.4 oz pouch) Recall
item.description: Hard corn starch lumps were found in the product Product details: CHIPS AHOY! Baked Bites Brookie .22.4 oz Carton ( 2.8 oz pouch ) and 7.7 oz Carton ( 1.4 oz pouch)

item.title: Booey's Gourmet LLC: Booey's Dragon's Breath sauce, 15.2oz ringneck glass bottle. Recall
item.description: Ingredients statement declares Anchovy and Sasame, but Contains statement does not declare Fish (Anchovy) and Sesame. Product details: Booey's Dragon's Breath sauce, 15.2oz ringneck glass bottle. UPC on bottle: 7 01936 29222 3. There are 12 bottles per case. Manufactured Exclusively for BOOEYS GOURMET 3924 N. Cannon St. Spokane, WA 99205. Label declares: INGREDIENTS: Contains Soy and Wheat. *...

item.title: Bee Well Honey Farm & Supply Inc.: Raw & Unfiltered Bee Well Wildflower Honey NET wT. 12 OZ (340g) Recall
item.description: High sugar content. The firm was notified by the FDA that sample results were positive for a high C4 sugar content. Product details: Raw & Unfiltered Bee Well Wildflower Honey NET wT. 12 OZ (340g) UPC 8 32587 00003 2, NET WT. 22 OZ (624g) UPC 8 32587 00002 5 & NET WT. 44 OZ (1.25g) UPC 8 32587 00001 8 100% Pure Honey Bee Well Honey 909 W. Main Street Pickens, SC 29671

item.title: PURE PALM C/O DVD: Label is predominantly green with white lettering in a clear plastic clamshell container. Pure Palm dates- Medjool Dates Net Wt. 16OZ Recall
item.description: mislabeled Coconut Date Bites. (product is coconut covered, label is for regular date bites) Product details: Label is predominantly green with white lettering in a clear plastic clamshell container. Pure Palm dates- Medjool Dates Net Wt. 16OZ UPC: 852160007005

item.title: Connecticut Crab Company LLC: Crab Cakes various sizes sold to food service Recall
item.description: May be temperature abused, which may result in growth of Clostridium botulinum Product details: Crab Cakes various sizes sold to food service

item.title: Zarlengo Italian Ice: Zarlengo's Double Dark Chocolate Gelato packaged in 1 Gallon bucket/pail - white round food and freezer grade High-Density Polyethylene buck Recall
item.description: Soy Lecithin listed in ingredients statement, but Soy is not mentioned in the contains statement. Product details: Zarlengo's Double Dark Chocolate Gelato packaged in 1 Gallon bucket/pail - white round food and freezer grade High-Density Polyethylene bucket/pail with tamper resistant lid.

item.title: Zarlengo Italian Ice: Zarlengo's Chocolate Chocolate Chip Gelato packaged in multiple sizes (6 fl oz cups, 16 fl oz cups, 32 fl oz cups, 1-gallon bucket/pail and Recall
item.description: Soy Lecithin listed in ingredients statement, but Soy is not mentioned in the contains statement. Product details: Zarlengo's Chocolate Chocolate Chip Gelato packaged in multiple sizes (6 fl oz cups, 16 fl oz cups, 32 fl oz cups, 1-gallon bucket/pail and 2-gallon bucket/pail) , Net Wt. 6 fl oz cups - clear freezer grade and round Polyethylene terephthalate cup with peelabl...

item.title: Riverence Provisions LLC: Riverence Smoked Trout Dip, net wt. 7oz. Product is perishable, refrigerated, packaged in plastic tub. Product is shipped to consignee froze Recall
item.description: Label declares cream cheese but does not declare milk Product details: Riverence Smoked Trout Dip, net wt. 7oz. Product is perishable, refrigerated, packaged in plastic tub. Product is shipped to consignee frozen by the case (12/7oz. units per case). Retail container UPC 7 07651 30561 3. Case item UPC #007076513057 Label declares...

item.title: Pure Vitamins and Natural Supplements, LLC: Blue Bull Extreme Male Enhancement Supplement, total of 15 pouches per box, Net Wt 15 G each pouch. Dosage: Consume Entire Pouch 30 Minutes Recall
item.description: FDA analysis revealed the presence of undeclared sildenafil Product details: Blue Bull Extreme Male Enhancement Supplement, total of 15 pouches per box, Net Wt 15 G each pouch. Dosage: Consume Entire Pouch 30 Minutes before Intercourse. Produced by Blue Bull Corporation Made In USA. UPC Code 707443349917

item.title: MEI YU CHENG DA TRADING INC: DADI NONGFU DRIED SALT CHILLI VEGETABLE(S); Recall
item.description: Products contain banned sweetener: cyclamates. Product details: DADI NONGFU DRIED SALT CHILLI VEGETABLE(S); Ingredients: Radish, chili, roasted sesame, prickly ash, edible salt, soybean oil, edible vinegar, white granulated sugar, spices, food additives (sodium glutamate, citric acid, sodium benzoate, potassium sorbate, so...

item.title: Pure Vitamins and Natural Supplements, LLC: Red Bull Extreme Male Enhancement Supplement, total of 15 pouches per box, Net Wt 15 G each pouch. Dosage: Consume Entire Pouch 30 Minutes b Recall
item.description: FDA analysis revealed the presence of undeclared sildenafil Product details: Red Bull Extreme Male Enhancement Supplement, total of 15 pouches per box, Net Wt 15 G each pouch. Dosage: Consume Entire Pouch 30 Minutes before Intercourse. Produced by Red Bull Corporation. Turkey www.redbullhoney.com UPC Code 9554100205595

item.title: MEI YU CHENG DA TRADING INC: Olive Skewers individually wrapped and packaged in clear plastic bag; 500g; Recall
item.description: Products contain banned sweetener: cyclamates. Product details: Olive Skewers individually wrapped and packaged in clear plastic bag; 500g; INGREDIENTS: Olive, edible salt, white sugar, monosodium glutamate, licorice, cloves, food additives (citric acid, DL malic acid, saccharin, sodium saccharin, steviol glycosides, aspar...

item.title: AYCO FARMS INC: Fresh Cantaloupe (Whole, Fresh), brand name Ayco, wrapped in food safe plastic bags packed in corrugated cardboard cartons; 6-12 melons per Recall
item.description: Potential Salmonella Contamination Product details: Fresh Cantaloupe (Whole, Fresh), brand name Ayco, wrapped in food safe plastic bags packed in corrugated cardboard cartons; 6-12 melons per box; individual carton count per label. Keep refrigerated; store between 36 40¿F.

item.title: Zarlengo Italian Ice: Zarlengo's Chocolate Gelato packaged in multiple sizes (6 fl oz cups, 16 fl oz cups, 32 fl oz cups and 1-gallon bucket/pail) , Net Wt. 6 fl Recall
item.description: Soy Lecithin listed in ingredients statement, but Soy is not mentioned in the contains statement. Product details: Zarlengo's Chocolate Gelato packaged in multiple sizes (6 fl oz cups, 16 fl oz cups, 32 fl oz cups and 1-gallon bucket/pail) , Net Wt. 6 fl oz cups - clear freezer grade and round Polyethylene terephthalate cup with peelable paper lid, laminated with heat-seal...

item.title: Pure Vitamins and Natural Supplements, LLC: Boner Bears Honey Male Enhancement 100% Wildflower Honey, total of 15 pouches per box, Net Wt 15 G each pouch. Dosage: Consume 1 entire pouc Recall
item.description: FDA analysis revealed the presence of undeclared sildenafil and Tadalafil Product details: Boner Bears Honey Male Enhancement 100% Wildflower Honey, total of 15 pouches per box, Net Wt 15 G each pouch. Dosage: Consume 1 entire pouch 30 minutes before Intercourse. MANUFACTURED IN: FLORIDA. UPC 788362191603

item.title: F&S Fresh Foods, Inc.: ReadyMeals Turkey Bacon & Cheddar Pretzel Duo Sandwich, perishable, Keep Refrigerated, plastic clamshell, net wt. 10 oz, Recall
item.description: Undeclared sesame. Sandwich contains visible sesame but label does not declare sesame. Product details: ReadyMeals Turkey Bacon & Cheddar Pretzel Duo Sandwich, perishable, Keep Refrigerated, plastic clamshell, net wt. 10 oz, UPC 8 26766 25036 3. Distributed By F&S Fresh Foods Vineland, NJ 08360. Label declares CONTAINS EGG, MILK, SOY, WHEAT.

item.title: Blueroot Health, Inc.: Vital Nutrients Aller-C (vitamin C, citrus bioflavonoids, isoquercitrin, and bromelain)100 count bottles and 200 count bottles Recall
item.description: Contains undeclared egg, soy, and hazelnut Product details: Vital Nutrients Aller-C (vitamin C, citrus bioflavonoids, isoquercitrin, and bromelain)100 count bottles and 200 count bottles

item.title: The Harvard Drug Group LLC: Omega-3-Acid, Ethyl Esters, Capsules, USP, 1 gram, 50 capsules (5 x 10 unit dose blister cards) per carton, Rx only, Packaged and Recall
item.description: Failed Capsule Specifications: Out of specification results obtained during routine stability testing for Loss on Drying of Capsule Shells. Product details: Omega-3-Acid, Ethyl Esters, Capsules, USP, 1 gram, 50 capsules (5 x 10 unit dose blister cards) per carton, Rx only, Packaged and Distributed by: Major Pharmaceuticals, Indianapolis, IN 46288. NDC: 0904-7495-06

item.title: B BRAUN MEDICAL INC: DEXTROSE INJECTION USP, 70%, 2000 mL bags, Rx only, Sterile, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, Recall
item.description: Lack of Assurance of Sterility; potential for leakage from the diaphragm port once the foil is removed. Product details: DEXTROSE INJECTION USP, 70%, 2000 mL bags, Rx only, Sterile, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, NDC: 0264-7387-50.

item.title: Leading Pharma, LLC: Furosemide Tablets, USP, 80 mg, 100 Tablets bottles, Rx only, Recall
item.description: CGMP Deviations; presence of N-nitroso-Furosemide (NNF) above the recommended intake limit. Product details: Furosemide Tablets, USP, 80 mg, 100 Tablets bottles, Rx only, Manufactured by: Leading Pharma, LLC, Fairfield, NJ 07004, NDC 69315-118-01

item.title: Premier Dental Products Co: Premier, Monsel's, Ferric Subsulfate Solution, 8 mL bottles, Rx only, Manufacturer: Premier Medical Products, 1710 Romano Drive, Plymouth Me Recall
item.description: Labeling: Incorrect or Missing Lot and/or Exp Date:The expiration date has an extra digit and is printed as 2709114 instead of the correct 270914 (2027-09-14). It is important to note that this error is limited to the vial itself; the saleable unit of the box of 12 bottles has the correct expiration date printed. Product details: Premier, Monsel's, Ferric Subsulfate Solution, 8 mL bottles, Rx only, Manufacturer: Premier Medical Products, 1710 Romano Drive, Plymouth Meeting, PA 19462, NDC 48783-112-08.

item.title: B BRAUN MEDICAL INC: LACTATED RINGER'S IRRIGATION, 3000 mL bags, Sterile, Ex only, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, Recall
item.description: Lack of Assurance of Sterility; potential for leakage from the diaphragm port once the foil is removed. Product details: LACTATED RINGER'S IRRIGATION, 3000 mL bags, Sterile, Ex only, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, NDC: 0264-7389-60.

item.title: Teva Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc: Claravis (isotretinoin capsule, USP), 10 mg, Packaged as a) 100-count carton, Recall
item.description: Failed Impurities/Degradation Specifications: Out of specification for specific impurity Tretinoin Product details: Claravis (isotretinoin capsule, USP), 10 mg, Packaged as a) 100-count carton, NDC 0555-1054-56, with 10x10 blister packs NDC 0555-1054-60; b) 30-count carton, NDC 0555-1054-86, with 3X10 blister pack NDC 0555-1054-60; Rx only, Teva Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc., N...

item.title: B BRAUN MEDICAL INC: 0.9 % SODIUM CHLORIDE IRRIGATION, USP, 3000 mL bags, Rx only, Sterile, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, Recall
item.description: Lack of Assurance of Sterility; potential for leakage from the diaphragm port once the foil is removed. Product details: 0.9 % SODIUM CHLORIDE IRRIGATION, USP, 3000 mL bags, Rx only, Sterile, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, USA, NDC: 0264-7388-60.

item.title: B BRAUN MEDICAL INC: Sterile Water for Injection USP, 3000 mL bags, Rx only, Pharmacy Bulk Package, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, Recall
item.description: Lack of Assurance of Sterility; potential for leakage from the diaphragm port once the foil is removed. Product details: Sterile Water for Injection USP, 3000 mL bags, Rx only, Pharmacy Bulk Package, B. Braun Medical Inc., Bethlehem, PA 18018-3524, NDC: 0264-7385-60.

item.title: Hetero Labs Limited (Unit V): Pantoprazole Sodium, Delayed-Release Tablets, USP, 40 mg, 1000-count bottle, Rx only, Manufactured for: Camber Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Piscat Recall
item.description: Discoloration: Firm received five (5) complaints stating that, "Tablets discolored darker than normal and have lighter-colored spots." Product details: Pantoprazole Sodium, Delayed-Release Tablets, USP, 40 mg, 1000-count bottle, Rx only, Manufactured for: Camber Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Piscataway, NJ 08854, By: Hetero, Hetero Labs Limited, Unit V, Polepally, Jadcherta, Mahabubager-509 301, India, NDC 31722-713...

item.title: SUN PHARMACEUTICAL INDUSTRIES INC: Fluocinonide, USP, 0.05% Cream, 30g tube, Rx only, Mfd by: Taro Pharmaceuticals Inc., Brampton, Ontario, Canada L6T 1C1, Dist. by: Taro Phar Recall
item.description: Failed Viscosity Specifications: Out of Specification results, above the specification limit, in viscosity, noted during stability testing. Product details: Fluocinonide, USP, 0.05% Cream, 30g tube, Rx only, Mfd by: Taro Pharmaceuticals Inc., Brampton, Ontario, Canada L6T 1C1, Dist. by: Taro Pharmaceuticals U.S.A., Inc., Hawthorne, NY 10532, NDC 51672-1386-2.

item.title: Xiamen Kang Zhongyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.: MGC Health, Menthol- Cough Suppressant, Oral Anesthetic, Cough Drops, Honey Lemon, 30-count bag, Recall
item.description: This recall is being initiated following FDA's recommendation based on certain observations noted during an August 15, 2025, inspection of the manufacturing facility that may bear on product quality. Product details: MGC Health, Menthol- Cough Suppressant, Oral Anesthetic, Cough Drops, Honey Lemon, 30-count bag, Distributed By: Medical Group Care, LLC, 1035 Collier Center Way, STE 5, Naples, FL 34110, NDC: 83698-114-30, UPC: 383173000047.

item.title: Owen Biosciences Inc.: FHF Farmhouse Fresh, Midnight Clearing, NIGHT LOTION, 2.5% BENZOYL PEROXIDE ACNE TREATMENT, OTC a) 0.5 fl. oz./15ml; and b)1 fl. oz./30ml tu Recall
item.description: Chemical contamination: Presence of benzene Product details: FHF Farmhouse Fresh, Midnight Clearing, NIGHT LOTION, 2.5% BENZOYL PEROXIDE ACNE TREATMENT, OTC a) 0.5 fl. oz./15ml; and b)1 fl. oz./30ml tubes; Made in the USA for FarmHouse Fresh, 8797 CR 858 McKinney, Texas

item.title: Xiamen Kang Zhongyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.: Discount Drug Mart Food Market, Cough Drops, Menthol -Cough Suppressant Anesthetic, 30-count bag, Recall
item.description: This recall is being initiated following FDA's recommendation based on certain observations noted during an August 15, 2025, inspection of the manufacturing facility that may bear on product quality. Product details: Discount Drug Mart Food Market, Cough Drops, Menthol -Cough Suppressant Anesthetic, 30-count bag, Distributed By: Drug Mart-Food Fair, Medina, Ohio 44256, Made in China, NDC: 83698-102-30, UPC: 093351037085.

item.title: Xiamen Kang Zhongyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.: exchange select, Menthol -Cough Suppressant Oral Anesthetic, Honey Lemon Flavor Cough Drops, 30-count bag, Manufactured for Your Military Ex Recall
item.description: This recall is being initiated following FDA's recommendation based on certain observations noted during an August 15, 2025, inspection of the manufacturing facility that may bear on product quality. Product details: exchange select, Menthol -Cough Suppressant Oral Anesthetic, Honey Lemon Flavor Cough Drops, 30-count bag, Manufactured for Your Military Exchanges By: Medical Group Care, LLC., 1035 Collier Center Way, STE 5, Naples, FL, Made in China, NDC 83698-580-30, UPC: ...

item.title: Angiodynamics, Inc.: Soft-Vu Angiographic Catheter, Kumpe, Non-Braided; SOFT-VU KMP 4F X 65CM 038 NB 0SH; Catalog No.: 10714014; Product/UPN No.: H787107140145 ( Recall
item.description: The affected devices contain a manufacturing defect which may prevent the appropriately sized guidewire from passing through the inner diameter (ID) of the catheter hub. Product details: Soft-Vu Angiographic Catheter, Kumpe, Non-Braided; SOFT-VU KMP 4F X 65CM 038 NB 0SH; Catalog No.: 10714014; Product/UPN No.: H787107140145 (Box), H787107140140 (Pouch); Box Quantity: 5 pouches;

item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Kits: 1) HEART TRANSPLANT BIOPSY, Model Number: DYNJ37543A Recall
item.description: The 510(k) regulatory clearances for certain Control Syringes, Guidewires, and/or High-Pressure Tubing have been rescinded. Product details: Medline Kits: 1) HEART TRANSPLANT BIOPSY, Model Number: DYNJ37543A

item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience Kits containing select SKUs of 10mL Polycarbonate Colored Syringes GU DAVINCI PACK - LF DYNJ909398A ROBOTIC PACK DYNJ908 Recall
item.description: Unapproved design changes to the products outside of the 510(k) clearance. Product details: Medline Convenience Kits containing select SKUs of 10mL Polycarbonate Colored Syringes GU DAVINCI PACK - LF DYNJ909398A ROBOTIC PACK DYNJ908706D

item.title: Olympus Corporation of the Americas: Olympus Thunderbeat II Shears w/Ultrasonic Mode, 5mm, 45cm. Model Number: TB2-0545FC. Recall
item.description: Potential for detachment of a distal tip component of the device during use. Product details: Olympus Thunderbeat II Shears w/Ultrasonic Mode, 5mm, 45cm. Model Number: TB2-0545FC.

item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Namic Guidewires: 1) GUIDEWIRE 3MMJ 0.035X260CM LT, Model Number: DYNJGWIRE20L; 2) GWIRE HYDRO 0.035 180CM ANG S, Model Number: DYNJ Recall
item.description: The 510(k) regulatory clearances for certain Control Syringes, Guidewires, and/or High-Pressure Tubing have been rescinded. Product details: Medline Namic Guidewires: 1) GUIDEWIRE 3MMJ 0.035X260CM LT, Model Number: DYNJGWIRE20L; 2) GWIRE HYDRO 0.035 180CM ANG S, Model Number: DYNJHWIRE105; 3) GWIRE HYDRO 0.035 260CM ANG S, Model Number: DYNJHWIRE107; 4) GWIRE HYDRO 0.035 260CM STR S, Model Number: ...

item.title: Angiodynamics, Inc.: AccuVu Angiographic Catheter, Straight Flush, Non-Braided, With 10 R/O Markers; ACCU-VU STR FL 4F X 100CM 035 NB 6SH 10 R/O 6@1CM 4@5CM; Cat Recall
item.description: The affected devices contain a manufacturing defect which may prevent the appropriately sized guidewire from passing through the inner diameter (ID) of the catheter hub. Product details: AccuVu Angiographic Catheter, Straight Flush, Non-Braided, With 10 R/O Markers; ACCU-VU STR FL 4F X 100CM 035 NB 6SH 10 R/O 6@1CM 4@5CM; Catalog No.: 13709604; Product/UPN No.: H787137096045 (Box), H787137096040 (Pouch); Box Quantity: 5 pouches;

item.title: Olympus Corporation of the Americas: OER-ELITE Endoscope Reprocessor Connecting Tubes. Model/Catalog Number: MAJ-2115. Recall
item.description: XXX Product details: OER-ELITE Endoscope Reprocessor Connecting Tubes. Model/Catalog Number: MAJ-2115.

item.title: LSL Healthcare Inc.: LSL Healthcare Wound Closure Tray, Model/Catalog Number: 7554 Recall
item.description: Medical procedure kits were distributed containing Webcol Large Alcohol Prep Pads which were subsequently recalled for non-sterility. Product details: LSL Healthcare Wound Closure Tray, Model/Catalog Number: 7554

item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Kits: 1) CATH LAB CDS, Model Number: CDS840228F; 2) IR PACK, Model Number: DYNDH2104; 3) CARDIAC CATH PACK-LF, Model Number: DYNJT21 Recall
item.description: The 510(k) regulatory clearances for certain Control Syringes, Guidewires, and/or High-Pressure Tubing have been rescinded. Product details: Medline Kits: 1) CATH LAB CDS, Model Number: CDS840228F; 2) IR PACK, Model Number: DYNDH2104; 3) CARDIAC CATH PACK-LF, Model Number: DYNJT2164M; 4) ANGIOGRAPHY TRAY, Model Number: DYNJT3078; 5) CATH PACK, Model Number: DYNJT4190; 6) ANGIO VASCULAR PACK, Model ...

item.description: The 510(k) regulatory clearances for certain Control Syringes, Guidewires, and/or High-Pressure Tubing have been rescinded. Product details: Medline Kits: 1) ANGIOGRAPHY PACK-LF, Model Number: DYNJQ0505M; 2) ANGIO PACK, Model Number: DYNJT2021G; 3) ANGIOGRAPHY PACK, Model Number: DYNJ31377B; 4) ANGIO PACK, Model Number: DYNJ51279; 5) ANGIOGRAPHY PACK II, Model Number: DYNJ52447; 6) CATH ANGIO PACK,...
